{{Infobox group
| name = Fathom Planetary Security
| introduced = The Pilot
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Fathom]] [[Planetary Security]] is a major defensive organization based on the planet [[Fathom]], which serves as the headquarters for the [[Galactic Union]] and is considered the center of [[Solstice]]. The agency operates under a mandate to maintain security across the galaxy, extending its reach beyond just the [[Free Worlds]]. The organization is highly mobilized during crises, capable of deploying numerous ships equipped with subspace drives and coordinating alongside private corporate troops. Its leadership includes a [[Security]] Chief and a Vice Chief, though the chief may not always be personally involved in specific operations. In combat scenarios, the group's forces have been known to form defensive nets of ships using plasma fire to restrict enemy movement. The agency is a primary component of [[Fathom]]'s infrastructure, alongside [[Union Intelligence]] and the [[Global Weather Service]].}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Fathom]] [[Planetary Security]] is an organization led by a Vice Chief, described as a plump woman who travels with drones. Although the group operates vessels equipped with [[Subspace Drives]], they are considered to have no business in their current location. Following an announcement of a state of emergency, the organization was eventually held off by [[Varic Vallenar]] acting alone.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">6</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The Vice Chief of [[Fathom Planetary Security]] is a plump woman accompanied by drones.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c2">''The Pilot'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Fathom]]’s [[Planetary Security]] is an organization with a Vice Chief.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c4">''The Pilot'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Fathom Planetary Security]] is a group that should not have business in the current location.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c10">''The Pilot'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Fathom Planetary Security]] operates ships with [[Subspace Drives]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c25">''The Pilot'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Fathom Planetary Security]] announced a state of emergency.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c26">''The Pilot'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Fathom]]’s [[Planetary Security]] is a group that [[Varic Vallenar]] held off on his own.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c43">''The Pilot'', chapter 43</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“Fathom Planetary Security should have no business here, and our subsequent investigations confirmed as much.”<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c10" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“Fathom Planetary Security announces state of emergency.”<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c26" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“He held off Fathom’s Planetary Security on his own. If this stops him for ten minutes, we’ll be lucky.”<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c43" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
